values.name: Dr. Emily Carter
values.title: DVM, Chief Veterinarian
values.bio: Dr. Carter has over 15 years of experience in small animal medicine. She leads our clinical team and is passionate about preventive care and building long-term relationships with patients and their families.
values.bio_zh: Carter 醫師在小動物醫學領域擁有超過 15 年經驗，帶領我們的臨床團隊，熱衷於預防醫學，並致力與患者及其家庭建立長期關係。

values.name: Dr. Jessica Lee
values.title: DVM, DABVP (Feline)
values.bio: Dr. Lee is our feline and exotic animal expert, with board certification from the American Board of Veterinary Practitioners. She has a special interest in cat-friendly handling techniques and exotic species.
values.bio_zh: Lee 醫師是我們的貓科與特殊寵物專家，擁有美國獸醫執業委員會（ABVP）認證。她特別專注於貓咪友善的保定技術與特殊物種照護。

values.name: Dr. Marcus Reed
values.title: DVM, DACVS
values.bio: Dr. Reed is our lead surgeon with board certification in veterinary surgery. He specialises in orthopaedic procedures, soft tissue surgery, and minimally invasive techniques.
values.bio_zh: Reed 醫師是我們的首席外科醫師，擁有獸醫外科委員會認證，專精於骨科手術、軟組織手術與微創技術。

values.name: Dr. Sophia Nguyen
values.title: DVM, MS
values.bio: Dr. Nguyen completed her residency in veterinary dermatology and holds a Master's in clinical nutrition. She manages complex allergy cases, skin disorders, and nutritional consultations.
values.bio_zh: Nguyen 醫師完成獸醫皮膚科住院醫師訓練，並擁有臨床營養學碩士學位，擅長處理複雜過敏病例、皮膚疾病與營養諮詢。

values.name: Dr. James Thornton
values.title: DVM
values.bio: Dr. Thornton joined PawClinic in 2020 with a focus on preventive medicine and community health. He is known for his gentle approach with anxious patients and thorough wellness consultations.
values.bio_zh: Thornton 醫師於 2020 年加入 PawClinic，專注於預防醫學與社區健康。他以溫柔對待緊張患者及細心的健康諮詢著稱。

values.name: Dr. Priya Sharma
values.title: DVM, DACVIM (Oncology)
values.bio: Dr. Sharma is our oncology specialist, helping pets and their families navigate cancer diagnoses with compassion and expertise. She coordinates closely with our diagnostic imaging team.
values.bio_zh: Sharma 醫師是我們的腫瘤科專家，以同理心與專業協助寵物及其家庭面對癌症診斷。她與我們的影像診斷團隊密切合作。
